title: Generating a CSV Header
scenario: Create the CSV header for a fictional dataset containing customer information (name, address, phone number, and email). The header must include column names, data types, and descriptions. Ensure the header is well-formed, valid, and easy to understand for users.
constraints: Must include a description for each column
Must use a specific column name format

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated CSV header is well-formed, valid, and self-descriptive.
Verify that the header includes constraints for valid data types and lengths (e.g., string, integer, email).
Evaluate the header for adherence to CSV header best practices, including formatting and organization.
